samples.input: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

messages.content: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

arguments.description: Read luminosity config value core.example

messages.content:
The `luminosity config get core.example` command failed — not because the key is missing, but because the personal config file itself is broken:

```
config file '.luminosity/config.local.md' has malformed frontmatter: unterminated frontmatter block
```

The file `.luminosity/config.local.md` has a frontmatter block (the `---`-delimited section at the top) that's never closed, so the CLI can't parse it at all. Per the skill's rules, I don't edit config files directly — that file is yours to fix. You'll want to open `.luminosity/config.local.md` and check that its frontmatter has both an opening and closing `---` line.

messages.content: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

arguments.description: Read luminosity config value core.example

attachments.20f483ac0421bd10a8426a9fa8126b9b:
The `luminosity config get core.example` command failed — not because the key is missing, but because the personal config file itself is broken:

```
config file '.luminosity/config.local.md' has malformed frontmatter: unterminated frontmatter block
```

The file `.luminosity/config.local.md` has a frontmatter block (the `---`-delimited section at the top) that's never closed, so the CLI can't parse it at all. Per the skill's rules, I don't edit config files directly — that file is yours to fix. You'll want to open `.luminosity/config.local.md` and check that its frontmatter has both an opening and closing `---` line.

```
luminosity: config file '.luminosity/config.local.md' has malformed frontmatter: unterminated frontmatter block
```

The file `.luminosity/config.local.md` in this repo has an unterminated frontmatter block (a `---` opening delimiter without a matching closing one). You'll need to fix that file's frontmatter before any config reads/writes will work. Want me to take a look at the file's contents?
